targets.rawSql: SELECT ROUND(SUM(base_amount),2) AS Net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND booked_date >= DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 1 MONTH),'%Y-%m-01') AND booked_date < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01')

SELECT ROUND(SUM(base_amount),2) AS Net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(booked_date)
SELECT ROUND(SUM(base_balance),2) AS Liquid FROM (SELECT base_balance, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY account_id ORDER BY as_of DESC) rn FROM balances) z WHERE rn=1

panels.title: Net per month (all accounts) — what actually stayed

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(base_amount),2) AS Net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

SELECT t AS time, ROUND(SUM(net) OVER (ORDER BY t),2) AS `Cumulative net` FROM (SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') t, SUM(base_amount) net FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(booked_date) GROUP BY 1) x ORDER BY t

panels.title: Real consumption by category — last 6 months (refunds netted)

targets.rawSql: SELECT t.category AS Category, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) AS Spend, COUNT(*) AS Txns FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE c.kind='expense' AND (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND NOT (t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.payee_raw LIKE '%Incasso ING creditcard%') AND t.booked_date>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 6 MONTH) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(t.booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN t.base_amount>0 AND c.kind='income' THEN t.base_amount ELSE 0 END),2) AS Income FROM transactions t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug WHERE (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND $__timeFilter(t.booked_date) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Spending by category — per month (top 10, stacked)

targets.rawSql: SELECT STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(DATE_FORMAT(t.booked_date,'%Y-%m'),'-01'),'%Y-%m-%d') AS time, COALESCE(top.category,'other') AS metric, ROUND(-SUM(t.base_amount),2) AS value FROM transactions t JOIN categories c ON t.category=c.slug LEFT JOIN (SELECT category FROM transactions WHERE (account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND base_amount<0 AND booked_date>=DATE_SUB(CURDATE(),INTERVAL 13 MONTH) GROUP BY category ORDER BY SUM(base_amount) ASC LIMIT 10) top ON top.category=t.category WHERE c.kind='expense' AND (t.account_id IN ('ing-checking','ing-card') OR (t.account_id LIKE 'ing-sav-%' AND t.account_id<>'ing-sav-k797')) AND NOT (t.account_id='ing-checking' AND t.payee_raw LIKE '%Incasso ING creditcard%') AND $__timeFilter(t.booked_date) GROUP BY 1,2 ORDER BY 1
